data.title: Binance will launch BRUSDT and PLUMEUSDT perpetual contracts
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch BRUSDT perpetual contracts at 12:45 (UTC) on March 21, 2025, and PLUMEUSDT perpetual contracts at 13:00 (UTC) on March 21, 2025, both supporting up to 25x leverage. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: James Wynn's associated wallet transferred another 389.18 billion PEPE to Binance, with a profit of more than $16 million in two years
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a wallet associated with James Wynn has transferred 389.18 billion PEPE to Binance again, worth about $2.84 million. The address has purchased a total of 2.82 trillion PEPE in two years, spending only 6.89 ETH (about $13,000). It has currently sold 1.92 trillion PEPE for a profit of about $5.63 million and 160,000 USDC, with a cumulative profit of more than $16 million. The address transferred $7.52 million in PEPE 10 months ago.

data.title: Grayscale: ETH's poor performance is a sign that the crypto market is still healthy
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Grayscale pointed out in a report that ETH's poor performance just shows that the crypto market is still focusing on fundamentals, which is a healthy signal. Its analytical framework believes that the Crypto market mainly distinguishes the value of smart contract platforms based on fees.
In the field of smart contract platforms, Ethereum and Solana both have relatively high fees and market capitalizations. Since the end of 2023, Solana's fee income and market share in the field of smart contract platforms have increased, while Ethereum has lost its main fee income and market capitalization position. In other words, due to changes in fundamentals, the market has appropriately repriced the relative value of Ethereum and Solana.

data.title: Pundi AI and Conflux Network jointly build high-performance decentralized AI solutions
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Pundi AI announced a strategic partnership with Conflux Network, planning to integrate its AI data solutions into Conflux's Tree-Graph blockchain architecture to improve the performance of decentralized AI applications. Conflux uses a consensus mechanism that combines PoW and PoS, supporting transaction speeds of up to 3000-6000 TPS while maintaining the security of the blockchain.
This partnership will focus on integrating the Pundi AI data platform and the AI ​​data market, enabling developers to use labeled data sets to deploy AI models on the Conflux network, and through its EVM compatibility, ensure a seamless experience for Ethereum ecosystem developers, making it easier for global developers to participate in AI development. The first batch of tools will support P2P sharing of AI training resources.

data.title: ZachXBT Links $1M Crypto Hack To William Parker
data.description:
Blockchain and crypto investigator ZachXBT discovered through his investigation that a key connection exists between the infamous criminal William Parker and the Solana-based casino exploit. On-chain transactions with matching Telegram messages indicated that Parker committed the $1 million theft in the Solana-based casino exploit..
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/21/zachxbt-links-1m-crypto-hack-to-william-parker/

data.title: Warren Buffett’s Berkshire Hathaway makes new ATH as the stock market crashes. How is he doing it?
data.description:
Berkshire Hathaway just hit a new all-time high while Wall Street is drowning in fear. The company led by Warren is now outperforming almost every major index in 2025.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/warren-buffetts-berkshire-hathaway-new-ath/

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches AFT, BNB Card, Mubarakah, and PLUME
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to the Binance page, Binance Alpha has launched AIFlow Token (AFT), BNB Card (BNB Card), Mubarakah (Mubarakah) and Plume (PLUME).

data.title: Binance Alpha Adds AFT, BNB Card, PLUME and Mubarakah
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Alpha has added AFT, BNB Card, PLUME and Mubarakah.

data.title: Zoth theft loss reached $8.32 million, the attacker's funds came from ChangeNOW
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to MistTrack monitoring, Zoth suffered a total loss of about 8.32 million US dollars in the attack. Tracking shows that the attacker's initial funding source was the ChangeNOW platform address. 
Earlier news, SlowMist tweeted that the core logic contract of the Zoth platform was replaced with a malicious contract due to the leakage of the administrator's private key.

data.title: 3e Network plans to acquire 4.9% stake in crypto mining platform HashBeaver at a valuation of US$30 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed 3e Network (Sanyi Technology) announced that it has signed a memorandum of understanding (MoU) with Singapore digital currency mining platform HASH BEAVER PTE. LTD (HashBeaver), intending to acquire 4.9% of the latter's equity at a valuation of US$30 million. It is reported that 3e Network also plans to explore the integration of its B2B software with HashBeaver's blockchain infrastructure.
